action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 25 crashed due to an IndentationError in inspect_bg.py. We still have a working baseline LPIPS=0.5692 but no training yet. With 5 iterations and ~7.67 hours left, we need to: (1) quickly determine the best image compositing strategy (raw rgb vs white/black compositing) because that could be a free LPIPS win, and (2) prepare a training script for fine-tuning TripoSR on the training data. Analysis: Running a lightweight compositing diagnostic on a few validation objects will take <5 min and tell us whether to composite onto white/black or use comp_rgb directly. Meanwhile, we can write train.py so the next iteration can start fine-tuning immediately. Decision: Write test_compositing.py and train.py. Run the compositing test now. In the next iteration, update model.py/predict.py with the best compositing and launch a short training run.
